description_long: This factory building features a large, rectangular main structure with a flat, dark roof punctuated by multiple rooftop HVAC units and vents. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, with a prominent front facade that incorporates greenish vertical paneling and a large roll-up loading dock door. The site includes a paved driveway and parking area, as well as a secondary, smaller building or annex attached to the main structure. The front entrance is marked by a canopy and a set of steps, while the rear and side areas are more utilitarian, with visible service zones and access points. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on industrial efficiency.
description: A modern, rectangular factory building with a flat roof, rooftop machinery, and a prominent loading dock entrance, surrounded by paved driveways and service areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, flat-roofed main building with rooftop machinery and a paved service area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the annex structure, service zones, and the arrangement of rooftop units.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main building, annex, and the driveway leading to the front entrance.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance with greenish paneling, a large loading dock door, and parking spaces.
